title: Fun with Numbers 1 to 10

segments.narration: Let's start by counting together from one to ten, ready?
Here are the numbers one through ten; can you say them with me?
Now try writing the numbers 1 to 10 on your paper; great job!
You did amazing today while counting and writing numbers; keep practicing!

teacherNotes: Encourage students to practice counting and writing numbers daily for reinforcement.
